input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.7.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.7.5
            TITLE: the front hoop must be no more than 250 mm forward of the steering wheel.

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.7.5: The Front Hoop must be no more than 250 mm forward of the steering wheel.
F.5.7.5 The Front Hoop must be no more than 250 mm forward of the steering wheel.  
This distance is measured horizontally, on the vehicle centerline, from the rear surface of the 
Front Hoop to the forward most surface of the steering wheel rim with the steering in the 
straight ahead position.

final_answer: rule F.5.7.5: The Front Hoop must be no more than 250 mm forward of the steering wheel. This distance is measured horizontally, on the vehicle centerline, from the rear surface of the Front Hoop to the forward most surface of the steering wheel rim with the steering in the straight ahead position.
